title: An Ordinance Amending the Title and Section 1 of Municipal Ordinance No. 2022-2336 Entitled "an Ordinance Approving the Conduct of Disyembre Na sa Bagong Los Baños Trade Fair for the Period of December 1, 2022 - January 15, 2023 and the Collection of Rental Fees for the Lease of Trade Fair Booths" to the Period of Every December of the Year.
